channel.title: Recent & Upcoming Talks | Di Wu's Homepage

item.title: Unary Computing
item.description:
(UW-Madison ECE757 Guest Lecture)

Present the current unary computing stack.

item.title: uGEMM: Unary Computing Architecture for GEMM Applications
item.description:
(ISCA'20)

Present an ultra-low power unary computing architecture for GEMM, which is compatible for both temporal and rate coding.

item.title: Introduction to Unary Computing
item.description:
(UW-Madison ECE757 Guest Lecture)

Present the basic concept of unary computing, as well as its mechanism and application.

item.title: Unary Computing for General Matrix Multiplication
item.description:
(UW-Madison Computer Architecture Affiliate Meeting)

Present uGEMM architecture, a high performance uanry computing architecture to unify the computation for both rate- and temporal-coded bit streams.

item.title: In-Stream Stochastic Division and Square Root via Correlation
item.description:
(DAC'19)

Present division and square root design in stochastic computing, which achieve high accuracy and efficiency by leveraging stochastic correlation among bit streams.

item.title: Deep Learning and Stochastic Computing
item.description:
(UW-Madison ECE752 Guest Lecture)

Introduce deep learning and stochastic computing, as well as the latest research overlapping both.

item.title: Nonlinear Stochastic Functions for Capsule Neural Network
item.description:
(UW-Madison Computer Architecture Affiliate Meeting)

Present design of nonlinear functions for stochastic computing, which can be used in Capsule Neural Network.
